ogTitle: Durham Lead vs Dutson: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Durham Lead and Dutson.
heading: Durham Lead vs Dutson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Durham Lead, Victoria and Dutson, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Durham Lead has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Dutson (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Durham Lead or Dutson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Durham Lead has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Dutson scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Durham Lead scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Dutson scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Durham Lead or Dutson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Durham Lead has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
